title: catha acuminata
intro: Catha acuminata, also known as Somaliland khat, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae, native to the Horn of Africa. The plant contains cathinone, a psychoactive alkaloid that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Catha acuminata include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, as well as its potential to improve cognitive function and boost mood. The plant can be consumed as a herbal preparation, typically in the form of fresh leaves or dried material, although its use is regulated in many countries due to its psychoactive properties and potential for abuse.
